keywords.name: transport_energy_integration
keywords.query: ((electric vehicle*) OR (electric bus*) OR (battery electric bus*) OR (charging infrastructure) OR (wireless charging)) AND ((power grid) OR (smart grid) OR (demand response) OR (energy system*) OR (renewable energy)) AND ((optimization) OR (planning) OR (scheduling) OR (operation))

keywords.name: transport_emergency_resilience
keywords.query: ((transportation resilience) OR (public transport resilience) OR (public transport disruption) OR (transit disruption) OR (service disruption) OR (emergency transportation) OR (disruption management) OR (service recovery) OR (service restoration)) AND ((public transport) OR (public transit) OR (transit) OR (bus) OR (metro) OR (rail transit) OR (multimodal transport)) AND ((optimization) OR (scheduling) OR (rescheduling) OR (planning) OR (routing) OR (dispatching) OR (network design) OR (timetabling))

keywords.name: or_ai
keywords.query: ((learning to optimize) OR (machine learning for optimization) OR (large language model*) OR (learning-augmented optimization) OR (ML-guided optimization) OR (learning to branch) OR (learning to cut) OR (learning to heuristics)) AND ((mixed integer programming) OR (integer programming) OR (combinatorial optimization) OR (branch-and-bound) OR (branch-and-cut) OR (cutting plane) OR (Benders decomposition) OR (decomposition algorithm))

keywords.name: ai_behavior
keywords.query: ((machine learning) OR (artificial intelligence) OR (deep learning) OR (large language model*) OR (explainable artificial intelligence) OR (interpretable machine learning)) AND ((travel behavior) OR (traveler behavior) OR (choice modeling) OR (mode choice) OR (discrete choice) OR (passenger behavior) OR (travel decision)) AND ((transportation) OR (mobility) OR (airport) OR (transit))
